meaning: n.閾滅豢,缁块攬,钖勫眰,鍏夋辰,鍙よ壊
examples: He looked relaxed and elegant and had the patina of success.
He allowed a fine patina of old coffee to develop around the inside of the mug.
Except for a patina of charisma, he was like a thousand other bright young men in Toronto.
It has graffiti on it and an original golden patina has gone black in places.
Those hits give the patina of success that rubs off on every participant in the market place.
